channel.title: Create OOB Management VM :: SE How-To Build Lab
channel.description: Create Full Clone and Install Packages Create Full Clone of “Ubuntu-Template” by right clicking on the VM Template VM ID: 441 Name: Ubuntu-OOB Verify Hardware, specifically 2 NICs: net0 == vmbr0, net1 == FTNTMGT Configure Cloud-Init per IP addressing scheme NET0 The 4th Octet for this VM MUST be x.y.z.80 If not using the default 172.16.3.x subnet, put in yours Example: ip=192.168.10.80,gw=192.168.10.1 NET1 10.100.55.80/24 NO Gateway Start the OOB VM
